title: 烟雾粉裙少女与巨兔
author: @iamsofiaijaz
prompt: 一张高分辨率的奇幻时尚摄影作品：一位年轻女子自信地走在城市停车场，身着一袭由旋转的粉红色烟雾与柔和薄雾织就、完全覆盖的优雅长裙。烟雾凝成一件端庄无缝的礼服，将她的胸部、躯干与臀部完全包裹，并自然垂落，缭绕双腿。她身后矗立着一只巨大的蓬松粉红兔子，由密集如棉花糖般的烟雾构成，散发柔和光晕，与氛围融为一体。场景超现实而魔幻，电影级光照，超真实质感，浅景深，锐利焦点，8K细节。女子拥有柔和的粉红发色、自然裸妆、平静神情与优雅姿态。无裸露胸部或裸体，品味高雅的奇幻时尚，梦幻却写实，专业摄影品质。
prompt_en: A high-resolution fantasy fashion photograph of a young woman walking confidently in an urban parking lot, wearing a fully covered, elegant dress made entirely of swirling pink smoke and soft mist. The smoke forms a modest, seamless gown that completely covers her chest, torso, and hips, flowing naturally down her body and around her legs. Behind her stands a massive fluffy pink rabbit made of dense cotton-candy-like smoke, softly glowing and blending into the atmosphere. The scene is surreal and magical, with cinematic lighting, ultra-realistic textures, shallow depth of field, sharp focus, and 8K detail. The woman has pastel pink hair, soft natural makeup, a calm expression, and a graceful pose. No exposed chest or nudity, tasteful fantasy fashion, dreamy yet realistic style, professional photography quality.

title: 日系少女赶地铁
author: @lxfater
prompt:
Role（角色设定）
你是一位专精 日系青春电影 与 可爱少女日常写真 的顶级摄影导演。你擅长用电影分镜和细腻光影，捕捉女主从容又笨拙的小失误，营造出暖心、治愈、略带喜剧感的早晨通勤场景。
Task（任务目标）
根据以下描述，生成一张 4 格拼接构图（Four-panel composition，2x2 网格：上左、上右、下左、下右）。
必须保持同一位日系少女形象在四格中 面孔与特征 100% 一致：黑色或深棕色齐肩直发、空气刘海、淡妆、身材偏纤细。
她的穿着为 日系少女通勤风：浅色针织开衫、白衬衫、格纹半身裙、帆布鞋，背一只简洁的单肩包或双肩包。

Visual Guidelines（视觉规范）
画面质感：cinematic, Japanese movie still, 8K, soft light, shallow depth of field, subtle film grain, natural skin texture。
色调：清晨暖色调，偏柔和的奶油色与浅蓝色，高光不过曝，整体偏 温柔、干净、可爱。
背景：日本城市住宅区与地铁站环境，干净街道、路牌、自动贩卖机、站牌等细节。

构图：2x2 网格布局（Upper-left, Upper-right, Lower-left, Lower-right），每一格都是一帧电影截图。

Panel Breakdown（四格分镜拆解）

上左（Upper-left）——【迟到的预感 / The Late Morning】

视角（Camera Angle）：室内门口处的中近景，略微高机位，好像观众站在玄关看她匆忙出门。

动作（Action）：她一边踩着鞋，一边抓起门边的包和手机，嘴里咬着一小块吐司或饭团，身体微微前倾准备冲出去。

表情（Expression）：困倦中带点慌张，眼睛微睁，眉毛略上挑，带着“糟了要迟到”的可爱慌乱。
重点（Focus）：清晨从门外洒进来的暖阳勾勒出她的轮廓，玄关处杂乱但温馨的小物（鞋架、雨伞、地垫）虚焦，突出少女的慌忙瞬间。

上右（Upper-right）——【街角小跑 / Corner Dash】

视角（Camera Angle）：略低机位的侧面全身景，仿佛跟拍镜头，背景是安静街区与十字路口。

动作（Action）：她背着包小跑，裙摆和头发随风轻轻扬起，一只手按着包带防止晃动，另一只手看腕表或手机时间。

表情（Expression）：有点紧张又带点好笑的无奈，嘴角微微撅起，眼神专注前方。

重点（Focus）：路边的自动贩卖机、路牌、低饱和的街景在运动模糊中掠过，地面晨光与她的影子形成斜斜的引导线，强化“赶时间”的节奏感。

左下（Lower-left）——【楼梯冲刺 / Stair Sprint】

视角（Camera Angle）：从地铁站楼梯下方向上拍摄的低机位，仰视她奔上楼梯或往站台方向跑。

动作（Action）：她扶着扶手快速上楼梯，步伐轻快，裙摆随着动作轻轻摆动，包斜跨在身侧。

表情（Expression）：稍微喘气但坚持、认真的神情，眉头轻皱却不失可爱。

重点（Focus）：楼梯上的光影分明，顶端可见写有站名的牌子与一点点天空。背景路人略虚化，突出少女努力赶车的剪影，整体仍保持干净、清爽的画面感。

右下（Lower-right）——【刚好赶上 / Just in Time】

视角（Camera Angle）：地铁车厢内的中近景，略高机位，好像站在她对面看着她。窗外有轻微运动模糊的隧道景色。

动作（Action）：她站在车门附近，双手抓着包带或扶手，微微弯腰喘气，肩膀仍有一点起伏。

表情（Expression）：松了口气的可爱微笑，脸颊略微泛红，眼睛里有轻松和自我调侃的感觉，像是在心里说“总算没迟到”。

重点（Focus）：柔和的车厢灯光照在她的脸上，皮肤质感细腻自然。背景是朴素的车厢座位与几位乘客的模糊轮廓，营造温柔又日常的通勤氛围。

Technical Constraints（技术限制）

Consistency：四格中少女的脸部特征、发型、身材比例、服饰风格必须完全一致，确保是同一角色。

Style：hyper-realistic yet soft, cinematic, Japanese slice-of-life movie still, natural color grading, soft focus, bokeh。

Atmosphere：可爱、治愈、轻松、带一点小紧张但完全日常向，像青春爱情电影开头的通勤片头。

title: 哥斯达黎加奇幻生态艺术插画
author: Artificial intelligence (Ai),Open Ai
prompt:
一个处于动态中的 {"macro medium" "[宏观介质 - 例如：液态金流、一缕烟雾、丝带]"}，从左下角向右上角形成一个动态的 {"shape" "[形状 - 例如：弧形、螺旋形、波浪形]"}。悬浮在 [纹理/材质] 中是一个微缩世界，其中包含 [微观主体 - 例如：一座城市、一个历史事件、一个生态系统]，这些主体被呈现为完全由 [宏观介质] 本身雕刻而成的高度精细的结构。

[介质] 内部：[细节 1]、[细节 2] 和 [细节 3]。这些形态看起来 [形容词 - 例如：编织的、液态的、晶体状的、发光的]，严格由 [宏观介质] 的物理特性决定。

风格：[摄影风格 - 例如：微距产品摄影] 与 {"artistic genre" "[艺术流派 - 例如：浮世绘、赛博朋克、巴洛克绘画]"} 相融合。高度强调纹理、光线和材质对比。调色板：[颜色] 自然地源自材质。

视角与背景：纯色、哑光 [背景颜色 - 通常为黑色或白色]，以营造最大对比度。极简构图。

排版：标题：“[标题]” 副标题：“[副标题]” 字体样式：[字体描述] 整齐地放置在负空间中。

构图规则：[介质] 创造了一个明确的边界。所有细节都严格保留在笔触/流线内部；负空间中不存在任何事物。8K，超现实纹理，[光照风格]。
prompt_en:
A {"macro medium" "[MACRO MEDIUM - e.g., stream of liquid gold, plume of smoke, silk ribbon]"}, captured mid-motion, forming a dynamic {"shape" "[SHAPE - e.g., arc, spiral, wave]"} from the lower left to the upper right. Suspended within the [TEXTURE/MATERIAL] lives a miniature world of [MICRO SUBJECT - e.g., a city, a historical event, an ecosystem], rendered as highly detailed structures sculpted entirely from the [MACRO MEDIUM] itself.

Inside the [MEDIUM]: [DETAIL 1], [DETAIL 2], and [DETAIL 3]. The forms appear [ADJECTIVE - e.g., woven, liquid, crystalline, glowing], strictly defined by the physics of the [MACRO MEDIUM].

Style: [PHOTOGRAPHY STYLE - e.g., Macro product photography] fused with {"artistic genre" "[ARTISTIC GENRE - e.g., Ukiyo-e, Cyberpunk, Baroque painting]"}. High emphasis on texture, lighting, and material contrast. Color palette: [COLORS] derived naturally from the material.

View & background:Plain, matte [BACKGROUND COLOR - usually Black or White] to create maximum contrast. Minimalist composition.

Typography:Title: “[TITLE]” Subtitle: “[SUBTITLE]” Font style: [FONT DESCRIPTION] placed cleanly in the negative space.

Composition rules:The [MEDIUM] creates a defined boundary. All details remain strictly inside the stroke/flow; nothing exists in the negative space. 8K, hyper-realistic texture, [LIGHTING STYLE].

title: 艺术工作室少女写真风格预设
author: Nano banana pro🍌
prompt:
```json
{
  "prompt": "一张柔和、低调的艺术学院风格照片，一位年轻女子盘腿坐在工作室地板上。她穿着米色连帽衫、米色长裤、白色袜子和黑色低帮运动鞋。她的姿势显得放松而略带笨拙，双手松散地搭在鞋子上。她留着齐肩波浪棕发，化着淡妆，戴着透明边框眼镜。手腕上有一个小星星纹身。场景是一个安静的艺术家工作室，背景有画架、贴在墙上的未完成素描、装满画笔的罐子和堆叠的书籍。自然窗光营造出柔和的阴影、柔和的色调和温暖、亲密的氛围。这张照片感觉年轻、真实、随意而富有艺术感，而非精致或商业化。",
  "style": "柔和自然摄影，艺术学院美学，极简主义，抓拍肖像",
  "lighting": "漫射自然日光，柔和阴影",
  "color_palette": "柔和中性色，米色，暖白色，微妙大地色",
  "composition": "主体居中，平视视角，亲密构图",
  "mood": "安静，亲密，年轻，平静",
  "camera": "35mm 镜头，浅景深，自然颗粒感",
  "quality": "高分辨率，真实感，未经修饰"
}
```
prompt_en:
{
  "prompt": "A soft, understated art-school style photograph of a young woman sitting cross-legged on a studio floor. She wears a beige hoodie, beige trousers, white socks, and black low-top sneakers. Her pose feels relaxed and slightly awkward, hands loosely clasped over her shoes. She has shoulder-length wavy brown hair, subtle makeup, and clear-framed glasses. A small star tattoo is visible on her wrist. The setting is a quiet artist’s studio with an easel, unfinished sketches taped to the wall, jars of paintbrushes, and stacked books in the background. Natural window light creates gentle shadows, muted tones, and a warm, intimate atmosphere. The image feels youthful, candid, and casually artistic rather than polished or commercial.",
  "style": "soft natural photography, art-school aesthetic, minimalism, candid portrait",
  "lighting": "diffused natural daylight, soft shadows",
  "color_palette": "muted neutrals, beige, warm off-whites, subtle earth tones",
  "composition": "centered subject, eye-level angle, intimate framing",
  "mood": "quiet, intimate, youthful, calm",
  "camera": "35mm lens, shallow depth of field, natural grain",
  "quality": "high-resolution, realistic, unretouched"
}

title: 特斯拉车内时尚自拍：Chanel配饰与自然光下的优雅女性
author: kingofdairyque
prompt:
请修改这张照片，不要完全改变她的面部特征，而是要展现出一位拥有椭圆形脸庞和完美身材的女性（而非过于消瘦的形象）。

她穿着一件象牙色的圆领紧身上衣，上衣中央印有Channel品牌的标志，整体造型非常时尚；外层搭配了一件宽松的牛仔裤夹克，夹克上也有Channel品牌的元素。她佩戴了一枚Channel品牌的金色戒指以及一条由长串Channel珍珠组成的项链。她的指甲涂成了裸粉色，还设计了芭蕾舞者风格的指甲造型，并配上了小巧的Channel品牌耳环。

她的皮肤白皙透明，脸颊上泛着淡淡的粉色。皮肤看起来健康而有光泽。她的眼睛呈浅蓝色，眼线画得很淡；睫毛卷曲且浓密（属于细长型睫毛），眉毛也很纤细。

通过自然的腮红营造出淡淡的玫瑰色妆容效果。她在嘴唇中央涂了柔和的粉色唇彩（带有轻微的渐变效果），让嘴唇看起来饱满而健康。她的头发呈闪亮的灰棕色，长度及腰，卷曲自然且蓬松，发型是高马尾搭配垂下的刘海，微风轻轻拂过她的头发。

这是一张自拍（从腰部以上拍摄）。她的头部微微向一侧倾斜，营造出时尚而优雅的姿态，目光直视镜头。这张照片散发着女性魅力与性感气息，同时又带着一丝冷静的感觉。背景有些模糊（略微失焦）。她坐在一辆特斯拉汽车的内饰中，车内装饰豪华且白色，车顶可以打开；照片拍摄于阴沉的早晨，自然光线洒在她的脸上。

她的姿势充满性感与诱惑力，目光坚定地注视着镜头。
prompt_en:
Edit this photo without changing her face 100% to reveal a woman with an oval face and ideal body, not skinny. 

She wears a ivory roundneck fitted top with channel emblem in the center, giving a chic look, as the outer is a oversize jeans jacket with subtle  channel as well. 
She wore a gold ring from the brand Channel and a gold stack necklace styled with long Channel pearls. She also wore nude-and-pink nail art with ballerina nails, and small Channel earing. 

She has clear white skin with pinkish tone blush on her cheeks. 
Her skin looks healthy and glowing.
She has light blue eyes with a thin liner, curly and defined eyelashes (wispy/manga lashes), and feathery eyebrows.
Focus on a natural blush to create a subtle rosy look.
Soft pink gloss applied in the center of her lips (with a slight gradient), giving the impression of healthy, plump lips.
Her shiny, healthy ash brown waist-length hair, was thick and loose curls giving effortless look, the hair is styled high ponytails with curtain bangs, with the wind blowing through her hair.

A selfie (from the waist up). Her head is tilted slightly to the side (head tilt), creating a chic yet elegant look. She gaze directly into the camera.
This photo exudes a feminine and sensual yet cool aura.
The background is slightly blurred (out of focus), She is in the driver seat in the tesla car white expensive looking interior with sunroof showing a gloomy morning with a natural sunlight accross the face 

Sensual an sultry pose. Staring intently at the camera,

title: 阳光花园中白裙美女写真构图指南
author: cinema 🎥

title: 重新构想的玫瑰金
author: @aziz4ai
prompt: Design a luxury-themed 1:1 image featuring a rose gold sculpture that embodies the essence of the jewelry brand “[BRAND NAME]”. The object must symbolically reflect the brand’s identity (e.g., falcon for Cartier, ring for Tiffany & Co., palm tree for Swarovski, camel for Prada). Embed premium crystal textures into key parts of the sculpture (e.g., wings, gem, leaves, or hump) to match the brand’s signature elegance. Use the brand’s iconic background color (e.g., Tiffany Blue, Swarovski White, Cartier Beige, Prada Sand) and place the official logo beneath the sculpture. Add a bold two-word slogan that aligns with the brand’s tone. Lighting should be pure white with high Kelvin value to ensure clarity and prevent yellow tint. The result must feel editorial, artistic, and visually exquisite.
prompt_en: Design a luxury-themed 1:1 image featuring a rose gold sculpture that embodies the essence of the jewelry brand “[BRAND NAME]”. The object must symbolically reflect the brand’s identity (e.g., falcon for Cartier, ring for Tiffany & Co., palm tree for Swarovski, camel for Prada). Embed premium crystal textures into key parts of the sculpture (e.g., wings, gem, leaves, or hump) to match the brand’s signature elegance. Use the brand’s iconic background color (e.g., Tiffany Blue, Swarovski White, Cartier Beige, Prada Sand) and place the official logo beneath the sculpture. Add a bold two-word slogan that aligns with the brand’s tone. Lighting should be pure white with high Kelvin value to ensure clarity and prevent yellow tint. The result must feel editorial, artistic, and visually exquisite.

title: 清新自然风女性户外人像写真
author: Zara
prompt: { "image_type": "肖像摄影", "composition": { "framing": "中景肖像，从腰部以上取景", "orientation": "竖幅", "subject_position": "居中", "camera_angle": "平视", "depth_of_field": "浅景深到中等景深，背景柔和模糊", "balance": "主体对称，但因枝叶而呈现有机不对称", "leading_elements": "周围的绿色植物和花朵环绕着主体" }, "subject": { "count": 1, "gender_presentation": "女性", "approximate_age_range": "青年", "pose": "放松的直立姿势，双手在腰部轻轻交握", "expression": "柔和、平静的微笑", "gaze": "与镜头直接眼神交流", "skin_tone": "白皙，带暖色调" }, "facial_features": { "face_shape": "椭圆形", "eyes": "浅色，可能是蓝色或绿色", "eyebrows": "自然，中等粗细", "lips": "自然唇形，涂有淡淡的粉红色口红", "makeup_style": "极简，自然妆容" }, "hair": { "color": "浅棕色，带暖色高光", "length": "及肩", "style": "蓬松，柔和波浪卷", "parting": "略微偏分" }, "clothing": { "top_layer": { "type": "纽扣衬衫", "color": "白色", "fit": "宽松，略大", "fabric_appearance": "轻薄棉麻质地" }, "inner_top": { "type": "T 恤或背心", "color": "白色", "fit": "修身" }, "bottom": { "type": "半身裙", "pattern": "拼布花卉和几何图案", "colors": ["米色", "奶油色", "柔和的绿色", "柔和的红色", "棕色"], "style": "复古风格" }, "accessories": { "bag": { "type": "斜挎包", "material": "皮革", "color": "棕色" }, "jewelry": "极简，可能有一枚戒指", "other": "手腕上系着一根细黑色发圈" } }, "environment": { "setting": "户外花园或庭院", "background_elements": [ "郁郁葱葱的绿色植物", "开花植物", "带窗户的建筑立面" ], "seasonal_cue": "春季或夏季" }, "lighting": { "type": "自然日光", "direction": "柔和正面光，略带侧面照明", "quality": "漫射，柔和", "shadows": "柔和，对比度极小", "overall_exposure": "明亮通透" }, "color_palette": { "dominant_colors": ["绿色", "白色"], "accent_colors": ["棕色", "柔和的花卉色", "柔和的粉色"], "tone": "温暖，清新，自然" }, "artistic_style": { "aesthetic": "生活化，自然，浪漫", "mood": "宁静，亲切，健康", "influences": ["现代生活摄影", "田园风"] }, "technical_traits": { "image_clarity": "高", "sharpness": "主体清晰，背景柔和", "noise_level": "极低", "likely_camera_type": "数码单反相机或高端智能手机", "lens_effect": "自然的背景虚化" }, "branding_or_text": { "visible_text": "右下角有小水印", "typography": "简洁的无衬线字体，白色，不显眼" }, "overall_description": "一幅明亮、自然的生活肖像，描绘了一位穿着白色服装的年轻女性，置身于郁郁葱葱的花园中，沐浴在柔和的日光下，传达出一种平静、优雅的氛围。" }

title: 照片转画布艺术品提示
author: Özge Döner
prompt: ```json { "generation_request": { "meta_data": { "task_type": "photo_to_square_canvas_artwork_only", "language": "zh-Hans", "priority": "highest", "version": "v1.1_DIRECT_CANVAS_ART_ONLY" }, "input": { "mode": "image_to_image", "reference_image_usage": "very_high", "preserve_identity": true, "preserve_facial_features": true, "notes": "将上传的情侣照片转换为方形画布画作。不进行产品设置。最终图像应仅为绘制好的画布设计本身，居中且干净。保持情侣可辨识，但简化为温暖的手绘插画风格。" }, "output": { "aspect_ratio": "1:1", "resolution": "ultra_high", "num_images": 2, "sharpness": "high", "grain": "subtle_canvas_texture" }, "canvas_art_style": { "art_medium": "画布上的丙烯插画", "texture": "可见的画布织物纹理", "linework": "清晰的墨水轮廓", "coloring": "柔和的彩绘填充与轻柔的阴影", "finish": "真实的手绘画布外观" }, "canvas_design": { "background_color": "柔和的淡紫色或柔和的粉彩色调", "pattern": "散落的小白色或浅色心形涂鸦", "couple_pose": "与上传照片相似的浪漫亲密坐姿拥抱", "edge_detail": "情侣插画周围的微妙白色轮廓" }, "subject_rules": { "identity": "匹配上传情侣的面部结构和发型", "expressions": "温暖亲切的微笑，带有淡淡的红晕", "hands": "正确的解剖结构，自然的互动", "wardrobe_translation": "原始服装的简化插画版本" }, "composition": { "centered": true, "clean_background": true, "no_external_objects": true }, "negative_prompt": [ "产品摄影", "画架", "木片", "蜡烛", "房间背景", "3D 渲染", "动漫风格", "水彩晕染", "文字", "标志", "水印", "多余的手指", "变形的手", "模糊" ], "quality_rules": { "must": [ "仅显示方形画布画作", "画布纹理清晰可见", "情侣可辨识", "干净的插画线条", "浪漫温暖的色调", "周围无多余物体" ] } } } ```

title: 粉樱暖光少女写真
author: ShreyaYadav___
prompt: 柔和的电影肖像——坐在凳子上的亚洲女人元描述高品质、柔软的电影肖像，描绘了一位成年亚洲女性坐在舒适亲密的工作室里的木凳上。正面朝四分之三角，抱膝，一只手靠近下巴。柔和的定向侧光，柔和的色调调色板，浅景深。不要改变或改变受试者的面部；不是公众人物。艺术家签名无年龄_范围成人（约25-35岁）非公开人物},提示主要的超现实、高分辨率的肖像照片，一位成年亚洲女性坐在舒适亲密的工作室里的简单木凳上。她以正面四分之三的角度站立，膝盖紧贴胸部，手臂松散地缠绕在腿上，一只手轻轻放在下巴附近。表情平静、温暖、温柔诱人。不要改变或改变她的脸；保持她的五官自然
prompt_en:
Gemini Nano Banana 3 Pro
{
title
Soft Cinematic Portrait — Asian Woman on Stool
meta
description
High-quality, soft, cinematic portrait of an adult Asian woman sitting on a wooden stool in a cozy intimate studio. Front-facing three-quarter angle, hugging knees, one hand near chin. Soft directional side lighting, pastel-toned palette, shallow depth of field. Do not alter or change the subject's face; not a public figure.
artist_signature
none
age_range
adult (approx. 25-35)
not_public_figure
},
prompt
main
Ultra-realistic, high-resolution portrait photograph of an adult Asian woman seated on a simple wooden stool in a cozy intimate studio. She is positioned at a front-facing three-quarter angle, hugging her knees close to her chest, arms wrapped loosely around her legs, one hand gently resting near her chin. Expression calm, warm, softly alluring. Do not change or alter her face; keep her features natural and true-to-life. Not a public figure.
appearance
Asian woman, adult, smooth refined skin with a slight dewy glow, delicate facial features, clear softly-illuminated eyes with gentle catchlights. Natural makeup only, minimal and elegant.
clothing_and_accessories
Loose textured knitted sweater in muted dusty-pink / mauve with slightly oversized sleeves, simple plain bottoms unseen or minimally visible. No strong jewelry or distracting accessories.
lighting_and_mood
Soft, diffused, directional side lighting (single key from one side) creating gentle shadows and smooth gradient across face and body. Cinematic, quiet and intimate mood with slight moody tonality. Pastel-toned color grading (muted pinks, mauves, warm neutrals).
composition
Shallow depth of field; face and eyes sharply in focus, sweater texture and legs softly falling into creamy bokeh. Framing: portrait orientation, subject centered but slightly offset to the lit side, three-quarter angle. Wooden stool visible but unobtrusive.
background
Neutral soft-focus backdrop in warm gray or muted earth tones, subtle vignetting to push subject forward, atmospheric depth.
camera_settings_and_style
Shot with an 85mm focal length, wide aperture (f/1.8–f/2.2) for shallow DOF, low ISO for clean image, medium telephoto compression. Filmic/cinematic soft grain, high dynamic range, smooth tonal transitions.
finishing
Color-graded in a soft cinematic pastel palette, gentle highlight on skin, natural skin texture preserved (no over-smoothing), slightly warm white balance, subtle filmic shadow roll-off.
instructions_for_generator
High detail, photorealistic, no face morphing or stylization, avoid resemblance to public figures, maintain age-appropriate, respectful presentation.
},
negative_prompt
no heavy makeup, no exaggerated retouching, no plastic or artificial skin, no face-swapping, no extra limbs, no text, no logos, no trademarked clothing, no harsh rim lights, no busy background, not cartoonish, not low-res, avoid over-saturation, avoid extreme poses, not a public figure
render_params
aspect_ratio
3:4
orientation
portrait
resolution
high (suggest 3000x4000 or higher)
quality
ultra
style
soft cinematic, pastel-toned, fashion portrait
seed
steps
sampler
euler_a
hdr
}
}

prompt_en: {   "shot": "A tight close-up mirror selfie",   "subject": {     "appearance": "a stunning woman",     "hair": "{"hair style" "long wavy hair"}",     "pose": "sitting casually sideways on a white bathroom vanity counter",     "gaze": "looking at the mirror"   },   "outfit": {     "bodysuit": "form-fitting black symbiote-inspired superhero bodysuit with subtle dark web texturing",     "emblem": "{"emblem color and shape" "prominent white spider emblem"} on the chest"   },   "phone": {     "device": "black smartphone",     "case": "white spider logo case",     "action": "holding it up to capture the reflection"   },   "environment": {     "location": "bathroom",     "lighting": "dimly lit with warm, soft indoor lighting",     "atmosphere": "intimate atmosphere with soft shadows",     "visible_elements": "only a partial section of the white sink basin and counter surface visible at the bottom of the frame",     "mirror": "mirror edges are cropped out of view"   },   "aesthetic": "high quality, photorealistic, lo-fi social media aesthetic",   "makeup": {     "blush": "prominent soft pink blush on her cheeks",     "finish": "glowy makeup",     "highlighter": "on the tip of her nose",     "lips": "slightly parted soft warm pink lips"   },   "skin": "highly detailed skin texture",   "lighting_detail": "even, invisible front illumination that softly brightens the face with neutral white light, no visible light source, no shadows, no reflections, no hotspots",   "quality": "no blur" }

prompt: 将这个对象设为透明。
prompt_en: Make this object transparent

title: 1990年代相机风格肖像
author: ﻿kingofdairyque
prompt: ﻿在不改变她原来的脸的情况下，用一台20世纪90年代风格的相机直接前闪拍摄一张瓷白色皮肤的美丽年轻女子的肖像。她凌乱的深棕色头发扎了起来，摆出一副平静而俏皮的微笑。她穿着一件现代的超大奶油色毛衣。背景是一堵深白色的墙，上面贴着美学杂志海报和贴纸，在昏暗的灯光下唤起舒适的卧室或私人房间的氛围。35mm镜头闪光灯营造出怀旧的光彩。
prompt_en: ﻿Without changing her original face, create a portrait of a beautiful young woman with porcelain-white skin, captured with a 1990s-style camera using a direct front flash. Her messy dark brown hair is tied up, posing with a calm yet playful smile. She wears a modern oversized cream sweater. The background is a dark white wall covered with aesthetic magazine posters and stickers, evoking a cozy bedroom or personal room atmosphere under dim lighting. The 35mm lens flash creates a nostalgic glow.

title: 圣诞雪球中的奇幻美人
author: 松果先森
prompt:
(Surrealism, fantasy art, macro photography style). A magical composition where the specific character is captured inside a giant, life-sized glass snow globe. [CRITICAL: Keep the face identical to the source image, maintain consistent facial features within the glass distortion].

Inside the Globe: The character is wearing a {"clothing inside globe" "white faux fur winter coat and a red Santa hat"}, catching falling snowflakes with her hands. The environment inside includes miniature snow-covered pine trees decorated with colorful Christmas lights twinkling in red, green, blue, and gold. A tiny wooden cabin sits among the trees. Swirling magical glitter and snow dust fill the air inside the sphere.

Outside the Globe: The background is a blurry, cozy living room with a fireplace, emphasizing that the character is inside the ornament.

Lighting: The snow globe is glowing from within, illuminated by the warm colorful glow of the Christmas tree lights mixing with cool magical blue and white light on the falling snow. The character's face is beautifully lit by this magical mixed lighting. External warm light reflects off the curved glass surface, creating rainbow prismatic effects.

Technical: Ray tracing reflections on the glass, refraction effects, crystal clear focus on the character, magical atmosphere, ethereal and dreamy aesthetic, 8k resolution, intricate details of the snowflakes and Christmas lights bokeh.

title: 冰雪女神静谧肖像
author: Myluna
prompt: 空灵的冬日女神肖像，美丽的年轻女子，留着铂金色长直发，发丝上覆盖着冰霜和雪花，双眼轻闭，神情宁静而沉思，苍白无瑕的肌肤上点缀着细微的霜尘，头戴巨大而精致的冰晶皇冠，锋利的冰刺向外放射，如同巨大的冰雪光环，身披精致的半透明白色面纱和飘逸的白色薄纱长袍，雪花在其周围飘舞，柔和而富有戏剧性的低调光线从下方照亮脸庞，深邃的星空背景下雪花飘落，营造出魔幻神秘的氛围，高对比度，电影感，超细节。
prompt_en: Ethereal winter goddess portrait, beautiful young woman with long straight platinum blonde hair covered in frost and snow particles, eyes gently closed, serene and meditative expression, pale flawless skin with subtle frost dusting, wearing an enormous elaborate crown made of jagged ice crystals and sharp frozen spikes radiating outward like a massive icy sunburst halo, delicate translucent white veil and flowing sheer white gown with snowflakes drifting around, soft dramatic low-key lighting from below highlighting the face, dark starry night background with falling snow, magical and mystical atmosphere, high contrast, cinematic, ultra detailed.

title: 地图生成等距建筑
author: @demishassabis
prompt: 以这个位置为地标，将其设为等距图像（仅建筑物），采用游戏主题公园的风格
prompt_en: Using this location as a landmark, create an isometric image (buildings only) in a theme park style.

title: 晨光中的温柔女友
author: dylandddeng
prompt: 描述从男友的角度来看，一个令人惊叹的韩国K-pop偶像坐在床上。衣服可见的项目白色蕾丝内衣套装（胸罩和低腰内裤），宽松地覆盖着白色开襟羊毛衫或长袍。详情开襟羊毛衫从一个肩膀上微微滑落，露出下面精致的蕾丝内衣。纯净舒适的氛围。头发颜色深棕色风格松散柔软的波浪，卧室里的头发有点凌乱。详情舒适地勾勒出她的脸。脸化妆自然的早晨外观，非常简约。新鲜的皮肤。表达一个温柔甜美的微笑直视着镜头。眼睛有点困，但很高兴。姿势描述靠着毛绒床头板和几个白色枕头坐着。上

I like white.

title: 社屋をトランスフォーマー風巨大ロボットに変身させる提示词
author: 高速印刷株式会社
prompt: 根据照片，请将公司大楼改造成一个巨大的机器人，风格为 {"style" "变形金刚"}。强调力量感和 {"color tone" "金属质感"}。
prompt_en: 写真を基に、社屋を{"スタイル" "トランスフォーマー"}風の巨大ロボットにトランスフォームさせてください。力強く、{"色調" "メタリックな質感"}を強調。

title: 黑发女子镜前自拍写真
author: Ravya
prompt:
```json
{
  "prompt": "一位年轻女子，留着长直发，发色为 {\"hair color\" \"黑色\"}，中分造型，坐在床上对着镜子自拍。她双腿弯曲并拢，膝盖略微分开。她右手拿着一部黑色智能手机，手机壳上印有红色云朵图案（《火影忍者》中的晓组织），举到脸前，部分遮住了脸，左手食指轻轻按在嘴唇上，做出“嘘”的姿势。她穿着一件白色吊带低胸迷你连衣裙，裙摆有蕾丝边饰，精致的肩带系成蝴蝶结。她身上有多处清晰可见的纹身：双前臂有复杂的图案，左胸上方锁骨附近有一个小纹身，右大腿上也有一个。她佩戴着低调的首饰，包括小耳环、珍珠项圈和细手链。背景中，一面大大的全身镜映照着一扇明亮的窗户，窗户上挂着薄薄的白色窗帘，让柔和的自然光洒满房间。右侧可见一个白色金属床架或床头板，上面装饰着小盆栽和紫色花朵。她坐的床上铺着白色羽绒被，上面印有精致的黑色花卉或植物图案。光线明亮、通透、柔和，营造出柔和的阴影，并突出了皮肤纹理和织物细节。图像对焦清晰，分辨率高，捕捉到了发丝、蕾丝质地和纹身清晰度等精细细节。整体氛围亲密、宁静，略带俏皮。女性的脸部必须与上传时完全一致——相同的特征、表情和角度——只改变发色为黑色。",
  "negative_prompt": "模糊、低质量、脸部扭曲、多余肢体、手部变形、不自然的光线、卡通、动漫、插画、绘画、文字、水印、多个人、不同姿势、不同服装、金发、棕发、短发、帽子、眼镜、不同的手机壳、刺眼的阴影、黑暗的房间",
  "width": 1024,
  "height": 1024,
  "steps": 30,
  "cfg_scale": 7.5,
  "seed": null,
  "sampler_name": "Euler a",
  "scheduler": "Karras",
  "denoising_strength": 0.75,
  "enable_hr": false,
  "hr_scale": 2.0,
  "hr_upscaler": "Latent",
  "hr_second_pass_steps": 20,
  "hr_resize_x": 0,
  "hr_resize_y": 0,
  "refiner_checkpoint": null,
  "refiner_switch_at": 0.5,
  "clip_skip": 2,

  "face_restoration_visibility": 1.0,
  "sd_model_checkpoint": "v1-5-pruned-emaonly.safetensors"
}
```
prompt_en:
{
  "prompt": "A young woman with long, straight black hair styled in a center part, taking a mirror selfie while sitting on a bed. She is positioned with her legs bent and drawn up, knees slightly apart. Her right hand holds a black smartphone with a red cloud pattern case (Akatsuki from Naruto) up to her face, partially obscuring it, while her left index finger is gently pressed to her lips in a 'shh' gesture. She wears a white, strappy, low-cut mini dress with lace trim at the hem and delicate straps tied into bows over her shoulders. She has multiple visible tattoos: intricate designs on both forearms, a small one on her upper left chest near the collarbone, and another small tattoo on her right thigh. She wears subtle jewelry including small hoop earrings, a pearl choker necklace, and a thin bracelet. The background features a large, full-length mirror reflecting a bright window with sheer white curtains on the left, allowing soft natural light to fill the room. To the right, a white metal bed frame or headboard is visible, adorned with small potted plants and purple flowers. The bed she sits on is covered with a white duvet featuring a detailed black floral or botanical print. The lighting is bright, airy, and diffused, creating soft shadows and highlighting skin texture and fabric details. The image is sharply focused, high-resolution, capturing fine details like individual hair strands, the texture of the lace, and the clarity of the tattoos. The overall mood is intimate, serene, and slightly playful. The woman's face must remain exactly as uploaded — identical features, expression, and angle — only the hair color is changed to black.",
  "negative_prompt": "blurred, low quality, distorted face, extra limbs, deformed hands, unnatural lighting, cartoon, anime, illustration, painting, text, watermark, multiple people, different pose, different outfit, blonde hair, brown hair, short hair, hat, glasses, different phone case, harsh shadows, dark room",
  "width": 1024,
  "height": 1024,
  "steps": 30,
  "cfg_scale": 7.5,
  "seed": null,
  "sampler_name": "Euler a",
  "scheduler": "Karras",
  "denoising_strength": 0.75,
  "enable_hr": false,
  "hr_scale": 2.0,
  "hr_upscaler": "Latent",
  "hr_second_pass_steps": 20,
  "hr_resize_x": 0,
  "hr_resize_y": 0,
  "refiner_checkpoint": null,
  "refiner_switch_at": 0.5,
  "clip_skip": 2,
  "face_restoration_model": "CodeFormer",
  "face_restoration_visibility": 1.0,
  "sd_model_checkpoint": "v1-5-pruned-emaonly.safetensors"
}

title: 外卖员的写真照
author: @songguoxiansen
prompt: 在明亮的摄影棚内拍摄的半身写真。美丽的东亚女孩，有着如瓷娃娃般无瑕的肌肤和闪烁的大眼睛，正俏皮地歪着头，用手轻轻触碰头盔上的黄色兔耳朵。她穿着整套带有美团Logo的黄色外卖制服。采用柔和、均匀的商业摄影棚打光，营造出清新、活力的氛围，背景深暗，突出主体。在图片最右面搭配上一列文字“我的人生可以用另外一种方式打开”，字体与照片风格相近。

title: 建筑设计草图生成
author: LeaderAI
prompt: 将上传的图像转为一个高度详细的建筑3D设计草图，位于图像的中心。该模型应具有复杂的细节，如楼梯和大门组件、窗户和钢架结构。在建筑周围是部分设计草图，突出不同的角度，带有铅笔阴影和清晰的线条。背景为浅灰色，关键组件上带有尺寸和文本注释。设计应注重技术准确性，一些颜色强调承重墙其他关键细节等重要特征。超真实，超高清。

title: 月光水域的俏皮定格

title: Q版套娃创意设计
author: -Zho-
prompt:
【参考】俄罗斯套娃图
【输入】图片
【提示词】把图片人物生成变成 Q 版可爱俄罗斯套娃🪆，大到小一共五个，放在精致的木桌上，横幅3:4比例

title: 人物从Instagram帖子边框中破壁而出
author: @Naiknelofar788
prompt:
为上传的人物创建一张超写实合成照片，人物从 Instagram 帖子边框中破壁而出。
站姿，双手握住边框边缘，上半身探出边框外并带有真实阴影。
高俯视角，仅对人物应用强烈的10mm 鱼眼效果（头大身小），边框保持笔直。
自信向上的眼神，紫色涂鸦风羽绒服，黑色 T 恤，金项链，白色运动鞋，墨镜，黑色帽子，黄色地面，叠加简洁的 Instagram 界面（simeon-sanai），照片级写实。
prompt_en: Create an Ultra-realistic photo composite of uploaded person breaking out of an Instagram post frame. Standing pose, both hands holding frame edges, upper body outside frame with real shadows. High top-down view, strong 10mm fisheye effect on person only (big head, smaller body), frame straight. Confident upward gaze, purple graffiti puffer jacket, black tee, gold chain, white sneakers, sunglasses, black cap, yellow floor, clean Instagram UI (simeon-sanai) overlay, photorealistic.

title: 3D橡胶软管角色设计
author: @The_Sycomore
prompt: [主题]，风格化的3D橡胶软管角色，流畅的3D渲染，纯色[颜色]背景，动态姿势，柔和的地面阴影，明亮柔和的光照，现代趣味设计
prompt_en: [Subject], stylized 3D rubberhose character, smooth 3D render,  Solid [Color] color background, dynamic pose, soft ground shadow, bright soft lighting, modern playful design

title: 红玫瑰上的情侣亲吻极真宝丽来照片
author: Özge Döner

title: Technical exploded view diagram of a device
author: Zara
prompt: Create a technical exploded view diagram of a {argument name="subject_en" default="[SUBJECT]"} in {argument name="dimension_en" default="1080x1080"} dimensions. The device should be deconstructed, showing all individual components floating in space, separated to reveal the internal parts. Each major component is labeled.
prompt_en: Create a technical exploded view diagram of a {argument name="subject_en" default="[SUBJECT]"} in {argument name="dimension_en" default="1080x1080"} dimensions. The device should be deconstructed, showing all individual components floating in space, separated to reveal the internal parts. Each major component is labeled.

title: 都市夜巷酷女孩写真
author: Ditherly - Creative AI Hub

title: 雪夜都市中孤独行人的电影感街拍场景
author: Ciri
prompt:
{
  "subject": "一位年轻的亚洲女性独自穿梭于熙攘人群中，身影孤寂，姿态沉思，中景镜头捕捉其上半身和头部。",
  "clothing": "深色厚重冬大衣（可能是海军蓝或炭灰色），浅灰色纹理针织围巾松散地围在颈部。",
  "hair": "齐肩深色头发，略显凌乱，被逆光照亮，发丝间可见雪花。",
  "face": "双眼低垂，神情宁静而略带忧郁，面部特征柔和，肤色苍白，唇部带有淡淡的红色，在混乱中显得平和。",
  "accessories": "白色帆布手提袋斜挎在右肩上。",
  "environment": "冬季繁忙的都市街景，大雪纷飞，雪花清晰可见，前景和背景中模糊的行人熙熙攘攘，日式街头标牌（蓝白色），交通信号灯，人群营造出层次感。",
  "lighting": "戏剧性的逆光，强烈的暖金色-橙色光芒（日落或钠灯）与冷青色/蓝色阴影形成对比，大气中的薄雾，镜头光晕，柔和的漫射光。",
  "camera": "浅景深（散景），主体对焦清晰，背景和前景高度模糊，长焦镜头压缩感，电影构图，胶片颗粒纹理。",
  "style": "电影感街头摄影，情绪化，氛围感强，情感丰富，新海诚美学风格，暖色调与冷色调之间的高对比度，怀旧，引人遐思。"
}
prompt_en:
{
  "subject": "Young Asian woman walking alone through a busy crowd, solitary figure, contemplative posture, medium shot capturing upper body and head.",
  "clothing": "Dark-colored heavy winter coat (possibly navy or charcoal), light grey textured knit scarf wrapped loosely around the neck.",
  "hair": "Shoulder-length dark hair, slightly windblown, illuminated by backlighting, specks of snow catching in the strands.",
  "face": "Eyes cast downward, serene but melancholic expression, soft facial features, pale complexion, subtle reddish lip tint, peaceful demeanor amidst chaos.",
  "accessories": "White canvas tote bag slung over the right shoulder.",
  "environment": "Busy urban street scene in winter, heavy snowfall with visible flakes, crowded with blurred pedestrians in foreground and background, Japanese street signage (blue and white), traffic signals, depth layers created by the crowd.",
  "lighting": "Dramatic backlighting, strong warm golden-orange glow (sunset or sodium street lights) clashing with cool cyan/blue shadows, atmospheric haze, lens flare, soft diffusion.",
  "camera": "Shallow depth of field (bokeh), sharp focus on the subject with heavily blurred background and foreground, telephoto lens compression, cinematic composition, film grain texture.",
  "style": "Cinematic street photography, moody, atmospheric, emotional, Makoto Shinkai-esque aesthetic, high contrast between warm and cool tones, nostalgic, evocative."
}

author: Vivek HY
